content: yaml npm package v2.9.0 (latest as of 2026-06-30). YAML 1.2 core schema by default. Key APIs: parse(str) returns JS value, parseDocument(str) returns Document with .errors[], .toJS(). Never throws by default — errors accumulate in doc.errors. parseAllDocuments() for multi-doc streams. Supports schema options: 'core' (default, YAML 1.2), 'yaml-1.1', 'json', 'failsafe'. Engine: Node >= 14.6. For frontmatter: extract text between --- delimiters then call parseDocument(). Unknown frontmatter keys are harmless.
